sub_graphs.name: TransactionTypeError_init
invariants: INV-001: transaction_type is stored as Final[int], immutable after construction
INV-002: super().__init__ is always called before field assignment

sub_graphs.name: TransactionTypeContractCreationError_init

Act: msg = "transaction type {type(transaction).__name__} not allowed to create contracts"
E: msg = "transaction type {type(transaction).__name__} not allowed to create contracts"

invariants: INV-001: transaction object is stored as a reference, enabling inspection of the offending transaction
INV-002: error message dynamically includes the transaction type name via __name__

sub_graphs.name: InsufficientMaxFeePerGasError_init

Act: msg = "Insufficient max fee per gas ({max_fee} less than {base_fee})"
E: msg = "Insufficient max fee per gas ({max_fee} less than {base_fee})"

invariants: INV-001: Both fee fields are Final[Uint], immutable after construction
INV-002: transaction_max_fee_per_gas < block_base_fee_per_gas is the condition that triggers this exception
INV-003: Both fee values are preserved for diagnostic inspection

sub_graphs.name: transaction_validation_dispatch

Act: type disallows contract creation AND to == None
contract creation allowed OR to != None
authorization list valid or not applicable
E: type disallows contract creation AND to == None
contract creation allowed OR to != None
authorization list valid or not applicable

invariants: INV-001: All exception classes inherit from InvalidTransaction
INV-002: Each validation check is mutually exclusive (pass xor fail)
INV-003: Validation checks are ordered by general-to-specific (type -> fee -> gas -> blob-specific)
INV-004: Every error path terminates by raising an InvalidTransaction subclass
INV-005: A transaction is valid if and only if it passes all applicable checks

sub_graphs.name: blob_transaction_validation
invariants: INV-001: Blob data presence is checked before count validation
INV-002: Gas limit is checked before fee sufficiency
INV-003: All versioned hashes must have version == VERSIONED_HASH_VERSION_KZG
INV-004: Validation fails on the first invalid hash (short-circuit)
INV-005: MAX_BLOB_COUNT bounds the number of blobs per transaction

sub_graphs.name: apply_fork
invariants: INV-001: apply_fork is an identity transformation for Osaka (no irregular state transition)

sub_graphs.name: get_last_256_block_hashes
invariants: INV-001: Returns at most 256 hashes
INV-002: Hashes are in order of increasing block number
INV-003: Only the most recent block hash is computed via keccak256; others use parent_hash from successors

sub_graphs.name: state_transition

Act: compute state_root, tx_root, receipt_root, bloom, withdrawals_root, requests_hash
prune to last 255 blocks if needed
E: compute state_root, tx_root, receipt_root, bloom, withdrawals_root, requests_hash
prune to last 255 blocks if needed

invariants: INV-001: Block RLP size must not exceed MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE (10,485,760 - 2,097,152 = 8,388,608 bytes)
INV-002: Ommers tuple must be empty in post-merge Ethereum
INV-003: All 8 computed roots/hashes must match header values exactly
INV-004: Chain retains at most 255 blocks after appending

sub_graphs.name: calculate_base_fee_per_gas
invariants: INV-001: Base fee can increase by at most parent_base_fee // BASE_FEE_MAX_CHANGE_DENOMINATOR per block
INV-002: Base fee increase is at least 1 when gas used exceeds target
INV-003: ELASTICITY_MULTIPLIER = 2, so gas target = gas_limit // 2
INV-004: Gas limit must pass check_gas_limit validation

sub_graphs.name: validate_header
invariants: INV-001: Block number must be >= 1
INV-002: Timestamps must be strictly increasing
INV-003: Block numbers must be sequential
INV-004: Extra data limited to 32 bytes
INV-005: Difficulty must be 0 (post-merge)
INV-006: Nonce must be zero bytes (post-merge)
INV-007: Ommers hash must equal hash of empty list (post-merge)
INV-008: Parent hash must match keccak256 of parent header RLP
INV-009: Excess blob gas must match calculation from parent
INV-010: Gas used must not exceed gas limit

sub_graphs.name: check_transaction

Act: has code and not valid delegation
E: has code and not valid delegation

invariants: INV-001: Transaction gas must not exceed remaining block gas
INV-002: Transaction blob gas must not exceed remaining block blob gas
INV-003: max_fee_per_gas >= max_priority_fee_per_gas for EIP-1559 txs
INV-004: max_fee_per_gas >= base_fee_per_gas
INV-005: Blob transactions must have 1..BLOB_COUNT_LIMIT blobs
INV-006: All blob versioned hashes must use KZG version prefix 0x01
INV-007: Blob and SetCode transactions cannot create contracts
INV-008: SetCode transactions must have non-empty authorization list
INV-009: Sender nonce must match transaction nonce exactly
INV-010: Sender balance >= max_gas_fee + tx.value
INV-011: Sender must be EOA or have valid delegation code

sub_graphs.name: make_receipt

Act: receipt = Receipt(succeeded=(error is None), cumulative_gas_used, bloom=logs_bloom(logs), logs)
E: receipt = Receipt(succeeded=(error is None), cumulative_gas_used, bloom=logs_bloom(logs), logs)

invariants: INV-001: succeeded is True iff error is None
INV-002: Receipt bloom is computed from logs via logs_bloom

sub_graphs.name: process_system_transaction
invariants: INV-001: System transactions always originate from SYSTEM_ADDRESS (0xff...fe)
INV-002: Gas is fixed at SYSTEM_TRANSACTION_GAS (30,000,000)
INV-003: should_transfer_value is False
INV-004: No value is transferred (value = 0)

sub_graphs.name: process_checked_system_transaction
invariants: INV-001: Target contract must contain code
INV-002: System transaction execution must succeed (no error)

sub_graphs.name: process_unchecked_system_transaction
invariants: INV-001: No validation is performed on contract code existence or execution result

sub_graphs.name: apply_body

Act: for i, tx in enumerate(map(decode_transaction, transactions))
E: for i, tx in enumerate(map(decode_transaction, transactions))

invariants: INV-001: Beacon roots system transaction executes before any user transactions
INV-002: History storage system transaction executes after beacon roots and before user transactions
INV-003: Transactions are processed in order
INV-004: Withdrawals are processed after all transactions
INV-005: General purpose requests (deposits, withdrawals, consolidations) processed last

sub_graphs.name: process_general_purpose_requests
invariants: INV-001: Requests are appended in ascending order of request type (deposit, withdrawal, consolidation)
INV-002: Deposit requests are parsed from block output logs, not from system transactions
INV-003: Withdrawal and consolidation requests come from checked system transactions (must not fail)

sub_graphs.name: process_transaction
invariants: INV-001: Gas refund capped at gas_used // 5 (EIP-3529)
INV-002: EIP-7623 calldata floor gas cost enforced after refund
INV-003: Sender pays effective_gas_fee + blob_gas_fee upfront
INV-004: Unused gas is refunded at effective_gas_price
INV-005: Miner receives only priority fee portion (effective_gas_price - base_fee_per_gas)
INV-006: Nonce incremented before message execution
INV-007: Accounts marked for deletion are destroyed after execution

sub_graphs.name: process_withdrawals
invariants: INV-001: Withdrawal amounts are scaled by 10^9 (Gwei to Wei conversion)
INV-002: Balance is always increased, never decreased

sub_graphs.name: check_gas_limit
invariants: INV-001: Gas limit change bounded by parent_gas_limit // GAS_LIMIT_ADJUSTMENT_FACTOR (1024)
INV-002: Gas limit must be >= GAS_LIMIT_MINIMUM (5000)
INV-003: Gas limit cannot change by more than ~0.1% per block
